# 00 Bootstrapping

You are an expert full-stack engineer. We are building a Healthcare AI Chatbot POC.

## The Vision

A context-aware chatbot that securely authenticates a user via JWT, reads their insurance tier from a PostgreSQL database, empathetic triages symptoms, and autonomously schedules appointments using standard calendar conventions.

## The Rules of Engagement

- We build feature by feature using Vertical Slices.
- You MUST NOT proactively write code for features I haven't explicitly asked for.
- You MUST use strict TDD (failing tests first).
- You MUST use CLI commands for all scaffolding and dependency management to get the latest compatible versions.
- You MUST end every response with a "Memory Check" summarizing what was built, listing CLI installs, confirming tests pass, and stating you are standing by.

## Tasks for this prompt

- Acknowledge the Vision and Rules of Engagement.
- Create the directory `.github/prompts/` and save this prompt as `00-bootstrapping.md`.
- Perform your first Memory Check. Do not write any application logic or run CLI commands yet.
